title: Health Fixer
description: A simple mod to properly display the health of players.
body:
HealthFixer is a small and useful client mod for Fabric that fixes incorrect player health displays in other mods (such as Neat, HealthIndicators, etc.).

🐛

Many servers use custom health plugins. Because of this, standard mods may display incorrect health values for other players. However, the server almost always displays the actual health as a number directly below the player’s nickname. This mod fixes this issue and allows you to use your usual mods without any problems.


![no mod - with mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c05d947d4da7647c4aa3c6c7d066fde33dbc8f66_0.webp)
